extension.summary: AutoCompletion for the virtual keyboard (needs skin support)
extension.description: AutoCompletion for the virtual keyboard (needs skin support)
extension.summary: Autocompletar para el teclado virtual (necesita soporte de skin)
extension.description: Autocompletar para el teclado virtual (necesita soporte de skin)
Private setup helper for a configured family Kodi environment. Contains no credentials.
extension.news:
v0.6.1 - Fix the English language placeholder so Kodi's PO parser accepts the add-on cleanly.
v0.6.0 - Add Kodi keymaps installer - Require Fen Light quick rescrape helper for keymap actions - Bundle current Fen Light quick rescrape keymaps
v0.5.0 - Add Kodi network advanced settings installer
v0.4.4 - Rename TorBox setup menu item
v0.4.3 - Internal TorBox setup update
v0.4.2 - Public metadata cleanup
v0.4.1 - Internal setup flow cleanup
v0.4.0 - Internal setup updates
v0.3.0 - Internal setup updates
v0.2.0 - Added setup menu
v0.1.0 - Initial private helper add-on

extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news: INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.summary: AI-search-enabled Fenlight fork with TMDb-backed results.
extension.description: A standalone Fenlight fork that adds Gemini-powered natural-language search while keeping TMDb as the source of truth for displayed results.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v1.0.10]: * Add TorBox Web Download cloud support so web-hosted uploads can be scraped, browsed, resolved, and deleted alongside TorBox torrent and usenet cloud items.
[v1.0.9]: * Refresh the Trakt and Real-Debrid QR-backed device-auth flow with styled Trakt QR cards, direct activation QR targets where available, bundled segno QR generation, and a one-time migration away from the old Trakt app key.
[v1.0.7]: * Add an optional strict original-language AI Search filter so prompts like Korean, German, or Dutch can become TMDb original-language constraints instead of loose keywords when enabled.
[v1.0.6]: * Update the built-in default TMDb API key and keep the Restore Default TMDb API Key action aligned with the new bundled value.
[v1.0.5]: * Add support for up to three Gemini API keys with automatic fallback on rate-limit or quota-exhaustion responses so AI Search can keep working when one project hits its cap.
[v1.0.4]: * Teach Gemini intent parsing to preserve named people separately from generic keywords so movie AI searches can feed TMDb cast-aware discovery and better literal title/franchise handling.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.summary: Access your content from Easynews and Debrid Clouds.
extension.description: This add-on is intended for advanced Kodi users only. You must own the content of any media you play through this addon. This is an English language only add-on.
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.
extension.news:
[v2.0.84]: * Migrate old ElfHosted AIOStreams manifest settings to the Midnight endpoint, use TMDb-to-IMDb fallback for AIOStreams ids, and guard non-JSON AIOStreams responses.
[v2.0.83]: * Prefer actual OpenSubtitles file names for subtitle selector matching, while keeping release aliases as labeled fallback context.
[v2.0.82]: * Let TorBox cloud scraping match completed cloud item filenames as well as folder names, and tolerate punctuation-only title differences after the year/episode gate. * Keep AIOStreams and TorBox Search Usenet rows on the stricter title/year filter, regardless of the TorBox cloud title-filter setting, so older same-title movies do not enter the source list. * Use AIOStreams search metadata as NZB lookup only and resolve TorBox Usenet Search through the local TorBox account; remove the direct TorBox Search API fallback. * Default the AIOStreams TorBox Usenet Search bridge to Midnight's search-enabled public instance, while keeping the endpoint editable.
[v2.0.81]: * Promote the tested manual source-list cancel cleanup and AIOStreams TorBox Usenet matching fixes to the production repo.
[v2.0.80]: * Refresh the active container after manual source-list cancel cleanup so Kodi's temporary watched overlay is cleared from the GUI.
[v2.0.79]: * Re-apply the saved Kodi watch/progress state after manual source-list cancel cleanup to avoid delayed dummy-playback writes.
[v2.0.78]: * Preserve existing Kodi watch/progress state when cancelling the manual source list workaround.
[v2.0.77]: * Prevent Kodi's generic Playback Failed dialog when backing out of the manual source list without selecting a source.
[v2.0.76]: * Trust ID-matched AIOStreams TorBox Usenet Search rows so official prefix text in release names does not hide valid cached results.
[v2.0.75]: * Let the no-results TorBox Usenet Search retry bypass the normal movie/TV account toggles, so those toggles only control ordinary scrapes.
[v2.0.74]: * Add optional AIOStreams manifest support for TorBox Usenet Search cached streams.
[v2.0.73]: * Strip superscript footnote markers from subtitle comments before selector matching.
[v2.0.72]: * Polish TorBox Usenet Search source display as TB USENET/NZB instead of prefixing release titles. * Keep TorBox Usenet Search rows mixed into normal quality and size sorting instead of pinning them with TorBox cloud sort-to-top.
[v2.0.71]: * Pass Fen Light's TMDb/show IDs into the a4k subtitle retry pool so OpenSubtitles can use exact parent-ID episode searches and avoid broad title fallbacks. * Add TorBox Usenet Search controls for movies and TV shows, plus automatic no-results retry support for cached TorBox Usenet Search.
[v2.0.70]: * Validate TorBox Web Download playback and remove temporary scrape/resolver diagnostics while keeping the WebDL cloud fix.
[v2.0.69]: * Add TorBox Web Download cloud support so hoster uploads such as GoFile-backed items appear in TorBox cloud scraping, browsing, resolving, and deleting alongside torrent and usenet items.
[v2.0.68]: * Seed first-run settings from the live patched Fen Light profile, including CocoScrapers, list/result/playback preferences, size filters, pagination, and update behavior while leaving user credentials, tokens, account values, and local paths out of the package.
[v2.0.67]: * Refresh the Trakt and Real-Debrid QR-backed device-auth flow with styled Trakt QR cards, direct activation QR targets where available, and the latest patched TMDb Helper Trakt QR dialog support.
[v2.0.66]: * Add an optional strict original-language AI Search filter so prompts like Korean, German, or Dutch can become TMDb original-language constraints instead of loose keywords when enabled.
[v2.0.65]: * Guard Trakt re-authorization prompts so only one dialog appears at a time, and skip watched-indicator refresh when Trakt returns an invalid payload instead of trying to thread over bad data.
[v2.0.64]: * Force Extras trailer playback into fullscreen video and stop the trailer when Back leaves fullscreen playback.
[v2.0.63]: * In Extras, fetch TMDb's standalone videos list when localized metadata has no trailers so Dutch metadata can still play English YouTube trailers.
[v2.0.62]: * Prefer playable YouTube trailer keys in the extras window, fall back to the best sorted YouTube trailer when raw trailer metadata is missing or non-plugin, and show a clearer no-trailer notice instead of failing playback.
[v2.0.61]: * Add a final OpenSubtitles English AI-translation fallback after Dutch subtitle matching fails, and tighten episodic subtitle matching so unrelated S01E01 Dutch results cannot win on generic release tags.
[v2.0.60]: * Use stable Trakt list IDs for custom/user list browsing, pagination, cache keys, like/unlike, and owned-list edits, with legacy slug fallback for old shortcuts and widgets.
[v2.0.59]: * Update the bundled default Trakt client ID and secret, and keep the settings manager restore-default actions aligned with the new Trakt defaults.
[v2.0.57]: * Refresh a stale Trakt access token once with the stored refresh token before showing the re-authentication prompt, and avoid caching invalid Trakt activity payloads. * Restore a dedicated in-play next-episode jump from the OSD while keeping Stop behavior available for episode playback.
[v2.0.52]: * Fix local resume bookmark cleanup after playback stop, including newer Kodi video-database detection and safer bookmark clearing around the patched playback flow.
[v2.0.50]: * Add a bundled default OMDb API key so patched Fenlight ships with extra-ratings support enabled without manual OMDb key entry.
[v2.0.48]: * Update the built-in default TMDb API key and keep the Restore Default TMDb API Key action aligned with the new bundled value.
[v2.0.47]: * Roll back the stricter playback-start validation from 2.0.46 and republish the prior startup behavior under a higher version so Kodi updates away from the bad test build cleanly.
[v2.0.46]: * Tighten playback-start validation so a source that only reaches a half-started state gets about 5 seconds of main startup plus a short grace settle before Fen retries the next candidate instead of treating started playback as automatically successful. * Keep the current hybrid handoff, and note that an intermittent Real-Debrid/Kodi teardown hang after stop() is still under investigation when a bad stream refuses to close quickly.
[v2.0.45]: * Strip tracker suffix noise like .rartv. and .eztv before release-group matching so season-pack sources such as S01 BiRDHOUSE rank above weaker same-quality fallbacks when their episode subtitle release matches.
[v2.0.44]: * Skip autoplay sources only when every detected audio stream is a blocked pirate-language track, so bad metadata cannot allow Russian-only/Chinese-only/Ukrainian-only sources and mixed-language sources with an acceptable track can still play.
[v2.0.43]: * Use the show's original or English title plus the actual episode name when building TV subtitle-search metadata and filenames, reducing mismatches on localized show labels.
[v2.0.42]: * Skip autoplay sources whose detected audio streams are Russian-only, Ukrainian-only, or Chinese-only unless the selected title metadata already expects that spoken language.
[v2.0.41]: * Add an explicit Trakt authorization status row to the settings window so expired or incomplete auth is visible even when a stale username is still stored. * Only show Authorize when Trakt is not fully authorized and keep Revoke tied to a stored Trakt user instead of treating the username as the only auth signal.
[v2.0.40]: * Demote bare generic movie-title subtitles to low-confidence fallbacks so structured release-specific matches can win when available. * Demote low-information source containment hits against structured DVDRip-style subtitles so malformed or ambiguous source names stop outranking stronger higher-quality matches.
[v2.0.39]: * Republished the TMDb metadata language and fallback-language controls under a higher production-safe test version.
[v2.0.38]: * Add TMDb metadata language and fallback-language settings for movie, TV, collection, episode, and people details. * Fill missing summaries from the configured fallback language instead of dropping back to English-only metadata requests.
[v2.0.37]: * Rebrand the patched add-on metadata under DutchTech so Kodi listings no longer show the upstream provider name for this repo build.
[v2.0.36]: * Add support for up to three Gemini API keys with automatic fallback on rate-limit or quota-exhaustion responses. * Expand the subtitle-backed retry pool to the best 10 selector-ranked candidates and let subtitle comments promote a stronger alias for the same subtitle item when they improve the release match.
[v2.0.35]: * Teach Gemini intent parsing to preserve named people separately from generic keywords so movie AI searches can feed TMDb cast-aware discovery and better title-like prompt handling.
[v2.0.34]: * Preserve meaningful technical bracket segments during bundled subtitle-selector normalization so release matching keeps cues like [1080p], codec tags, and year-style bracket tokens instead of discarding them as noise.
[v2.0.33]: * Add TMDb collection-search support for movie searches so matching collection results can open directly into the related movie-set listing.
[v2.0.32]: * Republish the same Gemini-backed AI Search test build under a higher test-only version so Kodi updates cleanly from the current production 2.0.31 release.
[v2.0.31]: * Add Gemini-backed AI Search inside Fen Light Patched so natural-language discovery can build TMDb-backed movie and TV result lists without leaving the patched addon. * Store AI Search history locally and expose a Gemini API key field in the existing settings manager.
[v2.0.30]: * Clear local Kodi bookmark rows using the real plugin:// playback URLs so erase-bookmark actions target the active movie or episode instead of relying on the old broad filename match.
[v2.0.28]: * Keep the smoother autoplay handoff that waits for fullscreen before closing the resolver window, reducing the flash back to the skin start screen. * Bridge selector playback metadata into Kodi properties so patched a4k can consume the exact selector-chosen subtitle for the active source at runtime. * Trim the successful pre-player settle before player.run(...) to reduce startup latency without changing retry timing.
[v2.0.26]: * Ship Fen Light Patched with reuse language invoker disabled by default so repo installs stop re-enabling it for setups that expect it off.
[v2.0.25]: * Refresh packaged branding and artwork so repo installs no longer reuse the old selector-test presentation.
[v2.0.24]: * Prefer direct subtitle filename evidence over uploader comments when both are available. * Strip OpenSubtitles track and language suffixes before source/subtitle matching.
[v2.0.23]: * Bundle the subtitle selector inside the add-on instead of depending on an external dev repo path. * Build the autoplay retry pool from one title-level subtitle gather and local selector ranking.
INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within Tools of add-on.

extension.description: TMDb Helper liefert Details über Filme, Fernsehsendungen und Schauspieler aus TMDb. Benutzer können auf eine Vielzahl von Listen aus TMDb TVDb MDbList und Trakt zugreifen.
TMDb Helper Patched provides details about movies, tvshows and actors from TMDb. Users can access a variety of lists from TMDb TVDb MDbList and Trakt.
TMDb Helper dostarcza szczegółowych informacji o filmach, serialach i aktorach z serwisu TMDb. Użytkownicy mają dostęp do szeregu list z serwisów TMDb, TVDb, MDbList i Trakt.
TMDb Helper tillhandahåller information om filmer, tv-serier och skådespelare från TMDb. Användare kan få tillgång till en mängd olika listor från TMDb, TVDb, MDbList och Trakt.
TMDb 助手从 TMDb（影视数据库） 获取电影、电视剧及演员的详细信息。用户可访问来自 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList 和 Trakt 的各类影视列表。
extension.disclaimer: Daten bereitgestellt von TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV und Trakt. Einige der Informationen werden von TheTVDB.com bereitgestellt. Bitte erwäge sie zu unterstützen. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data provided by TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV and Trakt. Some of the information is provided by TheTVDB.com. Please consider supporting them. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Dane dostarczane przez TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV i Trakt. Niektóre informacje pochodzą z serwisu TheTVDB.com. Prosimy o rozważenie wsparcia tych serwisów. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
Data tillhandahållen av TMDb TVDb MDbList OMDb FanartTV och Trakt. En del av informationen tillhandahålls av TheTVDB.com. Stöd dem gärna. https://thetvdb.com/subscribe
数据由 TMDb、TVDb、MDbList、OMDb、FanartTV 和 Trakt 提供。部分信息由 TheTVDB.com 提供，建议您支持他们。订阅链接：https://thetvdb.com/subscribe

extension.description: Coloured Studio Icons
White Weather Icons

extension.summary: Install Shield shortcuts for Fen Light rescrape/source select
extension.description: Helper that installs a Kodi keymap and runs Fen Light rescrape/source select for the focused AH2 movie or episode item.
extension.news:
v0.0.6 - Make the helper installable on all Kodi platforms so famYT keymap dependencies can resolve on Mac as well as Android.
v0.0.5 - Add AH2 search and TMDbHelper result window support.
v0.0.4 - Add package artwork.

extension.summary: Import widget backups and preloaded setups.
extension.description: Downloads or opens a widget backup ZIP, imports Skin Shortcuts XML or Arctic Fuse 3 Skin Variables shortcut JSON into the active skin profile, offers preloaded AF3 and AH2 setup imports, keeps a separate source importer for URLs and ZIPs, optionally retargets Fen-style paths to another video add-on, and creates a restore backup before overwriting anything.
Provides signal/slot mechanism for inter-addon communication
Module providing some AutoCompletion functions

Certifi is a carefully curated collection of Root Certificates for validating the trustworthiness of SSL certificates while verifying the identity of TLS hosts. It has been extracted from the Requests project.
The Universal Character Encoding Detector
Internationalized Domain Names for Python

extension.summary: Python wrapper for setInfo on Nexus InfoTags
extension.description: Python wrapper for setInfo on Nexus InfoTags
Common code required by TMDbHelper and other related jurialmunkey add-ons
TMDb 助手及其他相关 jurialmunkey 插件所需的通用代码
This module uses image libraries, Python Imaging Library (PIL) by default, to generate QR Codes.

extension.summary: Requests is an elegant and simple HTTP library for Python, built for human beings.
extension.description: Requests is an elegant and simple HTTP library for Python, built for human beings.
Python 2 and 3 compatibility utilities

extension.summary: urllib3 is a powerful, user-friendly HTTP client for Python
extension.description: urllib3 is a powerful, user-friendly HTTP client for Python. Much of the Python ecosystem already uses urllib3 and you should too. urllib3 brings many critical features that are missing from the Python standard libraries

extension.summary: Skin Variables helps skinners to construct variables and expressions for multiple containers and listitems using a template
Skin Variables 帮助皮肤设计者使用模板为多个容器和列表项构建变量及表达式
Skin Variables aide les skinners à créer des variables et des expressions pour plusieurs conteneurs et listes à l'aide d'un modèle
Skin Variables hjälper de som bygger skal att skapa variabler och uttryck för flera behållare och listobjekt med hjälp av en mall
extension.description: Skin Variables helps skinners to construct variables and expressions for multiple containers and listitems using a template
Skin Variables 帮助皮肤设计者使用模板为多个容器和列表项构建变量及表达式
Skin Variables aide les skinners à créer des variables et des expressions pour plusieurs conteneurs et listes à l'aide d'un modèle
Skin Variables hjälper de som bygger skal att skapa variabler och uttryck för flera behållare och listobjekt med hjälp av en mall

extension.summary: Texture Maker helps skinners build gradient based textures
extension.description: Texture Maker helps skinners build gradient based textures

extension.summary: Sync Kodi favourites.xml with Google Drive
extension.description: A minimal background service add-on that syncs Kodi favourites.xml with Google Drive using OAuth refresh tokens.
extension.news:
v0.2.36 - Stop using `datetime.strptime` for Google Drive timestamps so Shield startup sync does not crash while parsing remote modified times
v0.2.35 - Log the full Python traceback for sync failures so intermittent Shield startup errors are diagnosable from Kodi logs
v0.2.34 - Refine the packaged README with the simplified user-facing intro and explicit bridge key-deletion notes
v0.2.33 - Rewrite the packaged README to focus on the OAuth bridge security model and shipped addon behavior
v0.2.32 - Add bridge refresh-secret support so startup token refresh uses a second device secret instead of a public refresh endpoint
v0.2.31 - Replace the add-on fanart with the provided artwork, resized into Kodi's JPEG fanart format
v0.2.30 - Restore hidden internal settings and harden setting reads so Android startup sync does not crash after UI cleanup
v0.2.29 - Simplify the General settings page to only Pair Google Drive now and Sync on Kodi startup
v0.2.28 - Replace the add-on icon with the provided Favourites Sync artwork
v0.2.27 - Move Pair Google Drive to the top of the General settings section for faster setup
v0.2.26 - Remove the visible Remote Storage settings category so normal users stay on the supported appdata sync path
v0.2.25 - Replace blank placeholder artwork with a real add-on icon and fanart for Kodi UI
v0.2.23 - Repackage the last known-good Android behavior from the 0.2.15 code path as a newer update so Kodi can install the stable rollback cleanly
v0.2.22 - Roll back to the pre-experiment sync behavior used before the post-download UI refresh tests on Android
v0.2.21 - Roll back the post-download UI refresh experiment and restore the previously stable sync behavior on Android
v0.2.20 - Harden the download path on Android so a non-callable timestamp or local metadata refresh issue cannot abort a successful remote favourites download
v0.2.19 - Make the post-download skin reload fully non-blocking and switch to the simpler `ReloadSkin` builtin form so download syncs still succeed even if UI refresh is unsupported
v0.2.18 - Retry the post-download skin reload with a defensive builtin check so Android builds that expose no callable builtin API fall back safely
v0.2.17 - Revert the experimental post-download skin reload after it caused a runtime error on Android
v0.2.16 - Try a best-effort Kodi skin reload after downloading a newer remote favourites.xml so favourites may refresh without a second reboot
v0.2.15 - Log the effective upload toggle at sync start so Kodi UI/state mismatches are visible in the log
v0.2.14 - Log the granted OAuth scope string at sync start so Drive app-data scope mismatches are visible in Kodi logs
v0.2.13 - Use Kodi's native string settings API when available so claimed OAuth tokens actually persist on newer builds
v0.2.12 - Add targeted pairing and token persistence logging so Kodi-side OAuth handoff failures are visible in the log
v0.2.11 - Improve QR dialog readability with brighter text, better spacing, and wrapped URL display
v0.2.10 - Bundle a local skin texture for the pairing dialog so the modal background does not depend on Kodi skin assets
v0.2.9 - Make the pairing QR dialog fully opaque so it reads as a proper modal over Kodi settings
v0.2.8 - Add a self-contained pairing dialog background so the QR modal stays readable on Kodi skins without bundled dialog textures
v0.2.7 - Rework the Kodi QR dialog layout using a proven dialog window structure and local QR image file rendering
v0.2.6 - Send the pairing creation request as explicit JSON so the Vercel bridge parses Kodi requests correctly
v0.2.5 - Show a Kodi QR pairing dialog so users can scan the Vercel sign-in link from their phone - Stop auto-opening the system browser during pairing - Fix pairing progress updates for Kodi builds that only accept the older DialogProgress signature
v0.2.4 - Route the Google Drive pairing action through RunPlugin for better compatibility on Kodi/macOS - Add a startup fallback toggle to launch pairing on the next Kodi start if direct triggering is unavailable
v0.2.3 - Add a Kodi settings action button to start Google Drive pairing directly from the add-on UI

extension.description: Multi-source subtitles addon optimized for Seren and a4kScrapers. Supports: OpenSubtitles, BSPlayer, Podnadpisi.NET, SubDL, Addic7ed
extension.news:
[v3.23.39]: * Pass OpenSubtitles file names through as subtitle filenames while preserving release aliases separately for selector context.
[v3.23.38]: * Make OpenSubtitles TV episode searches exact in API mode: parent TMDb plus season/episode first, parent IMDb plus season/episode if TMDb is missing, no broad title fallback without an exact ID. * Reject OpenSubtitles TV rows whose parent ID, season, or episode do not match, and exclude OpenSubtitles AI-translated rows by default.
[v3.23.37]: * Keep AI subtitle translation off for fresh installs until an API key is entered, while leaving the API key field editable. * Disable stale saved AI translation toggles at runtime when no API key is configured.
[v3.23.36]: * Make the bundled GPT subtitle translator import on Kodi Windows Python 3.8 by postponing modern type annotations, and log translator import failures instead of hiding them.
[v3.23.35]: * Pin OpenAI subtitle translation to gpt-4.1-mini-2025-04-14 and migrate stale saved AI model settings back to mini at runtime.
[v3.23.34]: * Rename the local GPT fallback notification to GPT4 Translated.
[v3.23.33]: * Show the same AI-translated subtitle notification when a locally translated English fallback is actually attached.
[v3.23.32]: * Switch the default OpenAI subtitle translation model to gpt-4.1-mini-2025-04-14 to reduce fallback translation cost while keeping a stable GPT-4.1-family snapshot.
[v3.23.31]: * Translate selector-matched English OpenSubtitles fallbacks into Dutch as a full-file, resume-aware live subtitle, prefer embedded Dutch streams before AI fallback, and label translated files with the target language.
[v3.23.29]: * Search OpenSubtitles TV episodes by parent show IMDb id plus season/episode first, so numeric show titles like 1923 return the full episode subtitle set instead of a single broad title fallback.
[v3.23.28]: * Rebrand the patched add-on metadata under DutchTech so Kodi listings no longer show the upstream or placeholder provider name for this repo build.
[v3.23.26]: * Bypass the persisted subtitle-results cache during API-mode searches so Fenlight pre-play subtitle gathers always use a fresh subtitle result set instead of stale runtime cache state.
[v3.23.23]: * Consume Fenlight's selector-provided subtitle payload at runtime, keyed to the active playback source, before falling back to a fresh runtime search. * Speed up selector-backed startup attachment by fast-polling during the first playback seconds and trying the forced selector subtitle before the IMDb-gated fallback search. * On OpenSubtitles download 401, clear cached auth state, re-login once, and retry the same candidate so stale token failures recover automatically. * Shift movie OpenSubtitles retrieval toward IMDb-first searches with filename-year correction fallback so bad metadata years no longer suppress valid subtitle hits.
[v3.23.21]: * Prevent autoplay subtitle preparation from crashing when uploader comments contain Unicode digit separators such as ². * Rewrite matching-stem runtime subtitle temp filenames before attach so Kodi shows a readable external subtitle name instead of collapsing to generic (External).
[v3.23.20]: * Migrate the Kodi settings dialog to the current schema so provider toggles and account fields no longer reset while switching categories. * Restore selector shadow snapshots for multi-provider runs, including paired Fenlight source snapshots and history-only runtime/manual subtitle snapshots. * Make manual subtitle picks attach the real downloaded file directly so Kodi shows the chosen release name instead of TempSubtitle, without the old false failed-download notice.
[v3.23.19]: * Refresh packaged branding and artwork so repo installs no longer reuse the old selector-test presentation.
[v3.23.18]: * Add universal [AI]/[MT] badges to manual search subtitle rows so translated results are clearly marked across skins.
[v3.23.17]: * Prefer full OpenSubtitles release names for selector matching. * Keep API-mode settings overrides compatible with Kodi's read-only Addon object. * Refresh cached rows missing translation flags before selector ranking.
[v3.23.13]: * Fix comment-fallback ranking crash in final subtitle selection.
[v3.23.12]: * Use OpenSubtitles uploader comments as a fallback-only compatibility signal after direct filename matching.
[v3.23.11]: * Demote AI and machine-translated subtitle results during final ranking so they only win as fallback.
[v3.23.10]: * Move full release history into CHANGELOG.md so repository metadata stays compact.
[v3.23.9]: * Fix OpenSubtitles download retries and cleanup after failed downloads. * Improve subtitle ranking for prerelease and release-family mismatches. * Add resilient OpenSubtitles movie fallback search when year metadata is wrong. * Show a notification when an AI or machine translated subtitle is selected.
Full release history is now tracked in CHANGELOG.md.

extension.description: Arctic Fuse 3 Patched is a minimal row based skin with customisable widgets
Arctic Horizon 2.1
Arctic Horizon 2 Patched

extension.summary: Una skin minimalista de diseño horizontal
extension.description: DutchTech Fuse 3 is a DutchTech-maintained Arctic Fuse 3 fork with custom artwork and patched TMDb Helper routing.
DutchTech Fuse 3 es una skin minimalista de diseño horizontal con widgets personalizables
DutchTech Fuse 3 ist ein minimalistisches, zeilenbasiertes Skin mit anpassbaren Widgets
DutchTech Fuse 3 是一款采用简约行式布局的 Kodi 皮肤，支持小组件自定义功能
DutchTech Fuse 3 سكن مخفف بقوائم افقية وبامكانية تخصيص الاختصارات
Install this repository to receive DutchTech Kodi add-on updates from a GitHub Pages-hosted source.
